subject: [PATCH v4 2/9] mm/memory_hotplug: pass online_type to online_memory_block() via arg

2026-06-05.patch_summary: This patch modifies the `online_memory_block` function to accept an explicit online type through its argument, rather than relying on a default value. This change prepares for future scenarios where callers can specify custom online types. The patch also updates the `add_memory_resource` function to pass the default online type as a local variable. No functional changes are introduced by this patch.
